feed.title: Public key recovery for EC leaves in P2MR (BIP-360)

entry.title: Public key recovery for EC leaves in P2MR (BIP-360)
entry.summary:
The discussion highlights a critical viewpoint on the P2TRv2, emphasizing the necessity for resolving the EC-disabling timing issue before further consideration or implementation of this protocol. The skepticism voiced stems from concerns that without addressing this fundamental flaw, P2TRv2 risks being ineffective, relying merely on optimism rather than robust cryptographic principles. The conversation suggests a pause on debates surrounding this topic until a solution is presented, indicating a general consensus that further discussions would not be productive at this stage.
Additionally, there is an acknowledgment of an original idea (referred to as OP) which seems promising and has garnered interest regarding its potential integration into P2MR. This indicates a shift towards exploring other avenues or ideas within the same domain, suggesting a proactive approach to broadening the scope of current technological or methodological frameworks.
